agentAbility.name: Contracted Strike
agentAbility.description: Lock on to enemies in front of the vehicle for a missile strike. A short lock fires Hydra rockets, while an extended lock launches a homing Hellfire missile for much heavier damage.

agentTrait.name: Rising Tempo
agentTrait.description: Increases base reload time, but landing hits on enemies progressively reduces it.

primaryAttack.name: Single Shot
primaryAttack.description: Requires reload after each shot, most accurate when stationary.

tankAbilities.name: Dirty Substance
tankAbilities.description: Launches Grease to create difficult terrain and Slow enemies.

tankAbilities.name: Grenade Cluster
tankAbilities.description: Launches grenades that explode instantly on impact with an enemy or after a delay on the ground.
